identity.name: Polícia Marítima - Gestão de Serviços
identity.logo_strategy: Use Lucide 'Anchor' icon for UI + official crest image for documents

layout.form_layout: max-w-4xl mx-auto space-y-8 bg-white p-8 border shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm shadow-sm transition-all font-medium uppercase tracking-wide text-xs
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm font-medium text-xs tracking-wide border border-border
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm font-medium uppercase text-xs tracking-wide shadow-sm

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-primary disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground mb-1.5 block

cards.base: rounded-sm border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.header: flex flex-col space-y-1.5 p-6 bg-slate-50/50 border-b

tables.container: relative w-full overflow-auto rounded-sm border shadow-sm
tables.header: h-10 px-4 text-left align-middle font-semibold text-muted-foreground bg-slate-50 uppercase text-xs tracking-wider

icons.usage: Use crisp, thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) for a technical feel.

pdf_generation.strategy: Generate PDF purely on client side using jspdf. Do not use server-side generation to keep it simple. Match the official layout: Header (Left Logo, Center Text, Right Logo/Space), Info Grid, Main Table, Footer (Signatures).

data_handling.forms: Use React Hook Form + Zod for validation.
data_handling.state: Use React Context or simple state for this scale.
data_handling.api: Axios for fetching data from FastAPI backend.

universal_guidelines: Design for high density data but maintain visual clarity through whitespace.
Use uppercase, tracking-wide labels for form fields to increase legibility.
Avoid gradients. Use solid colors and subtle borders.
Interactive elements must have clear hover and focus states.
All text colors must meet WCAG AA contrast ratios against their background.
Forms should be broken into logical sections with clear headings.
Feedback (success/error) must be explicit and use standard colors (Green/Red).
Use 'Barlow' font for all headings to give an official look.
Tables should be stripeless but have clear border separators.
Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Stick to rounded-sm or rounded-md for a 'strict' look.
instructions_to_main_agent: Refactor the 'App.js' to include a Layout wrapper (Sidebar + Main Content). Create separate pages for Dashboard, Services Table, Ship Form, Police Form. Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the new colors and fonts. Install 'lucide-react', 'jspdf', 'jspdf-autotable', 'react-hook-form', 'zod', '@hookform/resolvers', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge' if not present. Use Shadcn UI components for all interactive elements.
